sections.title: Self-Classification
sections.description: Based on your current skill level, training, certifications, quality of work, and productivity.

fields.label: What level do you believe you are currently performing at?
options: Level 1 Skill Level: Beginner (LOF, basic, maintenance, tire install basic car repairs)
Level 2 Skill Level: Developing (Brakes, suspension, Basic diagnostics check engine lights, simple electrical)
Level 3 Skill Level: Advanced (Advanced diagnostics, CAN, drivability They don’t guess they diagnose)
Master Technician Skill Level: Elite (This tech can do it all without question or questions)

fields.label: Explain why you selected this level:

items.label: Proper use of scan tools and diagnostic equipment

values.f1: Level 3 Skill Level: Advanced (Advanced diagnostics, CAN, drivability They don’t guess they diagnose)
values.f2: I CAN DIAG MORE THAN JUST BASIC ITEMS. IM NOT AT THE LEVEL OF MASTER BUT AND LEARNING TO SUCCEED.
values.f4: MAJOR ENGINE REPAIR IS MY BEST WORK. ALONG WITH CEL DIAG FOR OLDER VEHICLES. WORKING ON THE NEWER VEHICLES.
values.f5: NEWER CAN SYSTEM DIAG IS MY MAIN FLAW. WILL NEED TO STUDY MORE INTO DIAG ON CAN SYSTEMS
values.f12: ONE GOOD PROCESS IT “CCC” ALONG WITH THAT I ALSO FOLLOW THE TRIPLE CHECK RULE. CHECK OVER MY WORK MORE THAN ONCE, TO OVER CHECK MY WORK AND MY QUALITY CONTROL
values.f17: I CAN IMPROVE IN MY BRAKE INSPECTION VIDEOS BY REMOVING THE WHEEL ASSY. AND PROPERLY SHOWING THE BRAKES
values.f19: IF ANY PERSON IN THE SHOP OR THE FRONT NEEDS ANY HELP I DROP WHAT IM DOING TO HELP AND ADVISE WHAT IS NEEDED AT JOB AT HAND. IF I DON’T HAVE AN ANSWER I FIND AN ANWSER AND NEVER GIVE UP TO HELP SOMEONE
values.f23: I CAN DEFINITELY IMPROVE IN MY TRAINING COMPLETION AND DO BETTER IN CLASS WORK IN A TIMLY MANOR
values.f24: COMPLETE ALL OF MY TRAINING AT HAND TO BE COMPLETELY CERTIFIED
values.f29: I WOULD SEE MY SELF TO HAVE ALL OF MY TRAINING COMPLETED AND BE COMPLETELY CERTIFIED
values.f30: AS OF TODAY I DO NOT NEED ANY HELP WITH THE JOB AT HAND AND CAN COMPLETE IN A TIMLY MANOR
values.f31: TRAINING COMPLETION WILL BE IMPROVED TREMENDOUSLY AND WILL BE COMPLETELY CERTIFIED
